Justification.Explanation: The High-Level Requirement HL-MAP-2.2 contains a typographical error in its name. Correcting the name to "Cell Classification" improves traceability and consistency across requirements, test cases, and tooling. This change is editorial but necessary to maintain traceability integrity.

Implementation.Solution:
<Requirement ID="HL-MAP-2.2"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Cell Classification</Name> <Content>Robot shall distinguish between free, blocked, and unknown areas</Content> <Relationships/> </Requirement>
<!-- Propagate the corrected name to any references that display the high-level name; since references use IDs, no functional change is required. -->

Justification.Explanation: LL-LOC-7.1 currently has both a DependsOn LL-EXPL-1.1 and a Refines HL-EXPL-1.1, creating redundancy and potential circularity in the traceability graph. The guidance is to choose a single trace mechanism and remove the redundant DependsOn to ensure a clean, acyclic traceability path.

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="LL-LOC-7.1"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Localization and Pose Estimation</Name> <Relationships> <Refines>HL-EXPL-1.1</Refines> <DependsOn>LL-EXPL-1.2</DependsOn> <DependsOn>LL-INTERF-6.1</DependsOn> <DependsOn>LL-MAP-2.1</DependsOn> </Relationships> <Content>Robot shall estimate its pose in the environment using sensor fusion and provide pose with uncertainty; Pose updates shall be integrated into the map and planning modules.</Content> </Requirement>

Note: This finding is addressed by the LL-LOC-7.1 update above. The redundancy (Refines HL-EXPL-1.1 and DependsOn LL-EXPL-1.1) is resolved by removing the DependsOn LL-EXPL-1.1 and keeping a single trace mechanism (Refines HL-EXPL-1.1). No additional, separate change is required beyond the LL-LOC-7.1 modification already implemented.
